creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
> I have installed FreeBSD6.2 on a pata drive and was going to rebuild
> the kernel to see if updated code would help.  Now I think I should
> load 6.1 and try cvs upgrade to 6.2 and try it that way.

I think I'd rather see the dmesg output from the 6.2 system booted
via the pata drive, with the sata drive attached, so we can compare
the messages; rather than the cvs upgrade.  It might save you some time.
